title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #12, Luffy, Unknown person #13, Kaido, Momonosuke as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The lingering snow is finally melting,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: will still shine in the afterlife,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone had to close the curtain on my life...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oden-sama, are you sure about taking in a freak like him?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AND YOU'RE A PERFECT FIT FOR THAT ROLE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, while I was performing on stage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Shinobu, take momonosuke- Sama and run!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Onigahsima Looms over the skies of mainland Wano...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 25 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
